name: Martin Šuba
title: Engineering manager
about: Engineering manager with a strong frontend background and experience across product development, delivery, and team leadership. I started in frontend engineering, building web applications, browser extensions, and JavaScript/TypeScript products, and later moved into broader roles focused on delivery, automation, and execution.

experience.title: Engineering Manager
experience.description: Leading the Solution Implementation team responsible for configuring, releasing, and delivering cybersecurity solutions to partners, while overseeing internal automation and delivery tooling development. In this role, I focus on improving delivery tooling, automating internal processes, and developing internal tools that bring value by improving workflows, reducing manual effort, and making delivery more efficient and reliable.

experience.title: Technical Project Lead
experience.description: In addition to my Engineering Manager responsibilities, taking on a side role as TPL. Managing Tier-1 partner deliveries end-to-end, coordinating cross-team work, and improving delivery processes in a dynamic environment.

experience.title: Lead Frontend engineer
experience.description: Led frontend development of password manager clients, including browser extensions and SDKs for JavaScript, iOS, and Android. Worked in a dynamic post-acquisition environment, integrating both the team and product into a new organizational structure while aligning with company standards. Delivered full lifecycle solutions, coordinated cross-team execution, and mentored engineers while driving best practices.

experience.title: Lead Frontend engineer at SaferPass (acquired by F-Secure)
Javascript Developer (acquired by Lookout)
experience.description: Taking care of front-end part of SaferPass password manager browser extension. Mostly working with javascript/typescript, angularJS, React, web extension API, web API, node.js. Implementing new features as well as refactoring legacy code and writing unit tests.

experience.title: Front-end web developer
experience.description: Building front-end of responsive cross-browser/platform web and mobile applications. Working mostly with HTML, SASS, Javascript, jQuery and frameworks like AngularJS, Angular and Ionic.

experience.title: Front-end web developer
experience.description: Creating web sites and user interfaces using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Cooperating with graphic designers and back-end developers. Working for clients like O2, Sberbank, SLSP, VÚB and Hyundai.

experience.title: Front-end web developer
experience.description: I focused mainly on coding web pages, coding e-mail newsletters, customizing WordPress templates and some other online marketing activities.
